title: Statistics Greenland
summary: Statistics Greenland (Greenlandic: Kalaallit Nunaanni Naatsorsueqqissaartarfik, Danish: Grønlands Statistik) is a central statistical organization in Greenland, operating  under the auspices of the Government of Greenland, working in cooperation with the Ministry for Finance. Based in Nuuk, the capital of Greenland, the organization was founded on 19 July 1989 by the Government of Greenland.
